name: Lisha - meow adventures
description:
Hello. This is my first bot, and I’m not sure how it will behave for other users. I’ve made it public so you can test it and share your feedback.

Disclaimer:

  • I cannot guarantee the quality of posts generated by the jllm.

  • I DO NOT SPEAK ENGLISH. The initial post might look awkward or poorly translated.

Bot Concept:

You play as a human who has ended up in the territory of the demihumans under unknown circumstances.

Lore Background:

  • Humans and demihumans have been at war for ages.

  • The human state: Almeria.

  • The demihumans state: The City of Shadows.

I won’t spoil too much—you’ll discover more as you interact with the bot. Enjoy!
creator: awooke
